name: blastguard
description: A PreToolUse guard for Claude Code: inspects Bash commands and file operations and denies the project-destroying ones — recursive/wildcard rm, git reset --hard, git clean -fdx, truncate/shred/mkfs, dd of=, recursive chmod/chown, find -delete, and single-> overwrites — while exempting repo config files. Subscription-native (one hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).
